channel.title: GitHub Vue Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: CorentinTh/it-tools
item.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

item.title: HelgeSverre/ollama-gui
item.description: A Web Interface for chatting with your local LLMs via the ollama API

item.title: frappe/helpdesk
item.description: Modern, Streamlined, Free and Open Source Customer Service Software

item.title: frappe/crm
item.description: Fully featured, open source CRM

item.title: 0xJacky/nginx-ui
item.description: Yet another WebUI for Nginx

item.title: imsyy/SPlayer
item.description: 🎉 一个简约的音乐播放器，支持逐字歌词，下载歌曲，展示评论区，音乐云盘及歌单管理，音乐频谱，移动端基础适配 | 网易云音乐 | A minimalist music player

item.title: ccbikai/Sink
item.description: ⚡ A Simple / Speedy / Secure Link Shortener with Analytics, 100% run on Cloudflare.

item.title: iAJue/MoeKoeMusic
item.description: 一款开源简洁高颜值的酷狗第三方客户端 An open-source, concise, and aesthetically pleasing third-party client for KuGou that supports Windows / macOS / Linux

item.title: LOG1997/log-lottery
item.description: 🎈🎈🎈🎈年会抽奖程序，threejs+vue3 3D球体动态抽奖应用。

item.title: lookscanned/lookscanned.io
item.description: 📚 LookScanned.io - Make your PDFs look scanned

item.title: RikkaApps/websites
item.description: Websites for Rikka apps.

item.title: frappe/frappe-ui
item.description: A set of components and utilities for rapid UI development

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: opentiny/tiny-engine
item.description: TinyEngine is a low-code engine based on which you can build or develop low-code platforms in different domains/TinyEngine是一个低代码引擎，基于这个引擎可以构建或者开发出不同领域的低代码平台

item.title: elk-zone/elk
item.description: A nimble Mastodon web client

item.title: bastienwirtz/homer
item.description: A very simple static homepage for your server.

item.title: freqtrade/frequi
item.description: Freqtrade UI - Frontend for Freqtrade

item.title: donaldzou/WGDashboard
item.description: Simple dashboard for WireGuard VPN written in Python & Vue.js

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: alireza0/s-ui
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box
